How Many Scholarships Are Available?

McGill awards approximately 35 scholarships each year.

Is the Scholarship Available for Undergraduate Students?

No.

The scholarship is exclusively for master’s-level studies.

Is Attendance at an Information Session Mandatory?

Yes.

Only attendees receive access to the application form.

Can I Apply If I Don’t Meet McGill Admission Requirements?

No.

Applicants must first meet graduate admission requirements.

What Happens During Pre-Screening?

McGill evaluates:

  • Age eligibility
  • Citizenship
  • Residency
  • Academic readiness
  • Leadership profile
  • Motivation
  • Master’s degree history

How Long Does Pre-Screening Take?

Applicants can expect results within 4–6 weeks.

What Happens If I Pass Pre-Screening?

Successful candidates receive:

  • Application fee waivers
  • Instructions for applying to McGill

What Is Conditional Admission?

Conditional admission means admission is dependent on receiving the scholarship.

What Happens If I Am Admitted But Not Awarded the Scholarship?

Conditional admission will be withdrawn.

Applicants may reapply during future cycles.

Can I Appeal Scholarship Decisions?

No.

All decisions are final.

Visit HERE for more FAQs about the Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program at McGill University 2027.

Conclusion

The Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program at McGill University remains one of the most prestigious fully funded master’s scholarship opportunities available to African students. With comprehensive financial support, world-class education, leadership development opportunities, and access to a powerful global network, the program provides exceptional young African leaders with the tools needed to transform communities and drive sustainable development across the continent.

For ambitious students passionate about public health, nutrition, public policy, biotechnology, food systems, environmental sustainability, and agriculture, this scholarship represents a life-changing opportunity to study at one of Canada’s leading universities while preparing to become a catalyst for positive change in Africa.

Discover more global Scholarship and African opportunities in OFY.

The post Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program at McGill University 2027: Fully Funded Master’s Scholarships for African Leaders in Public Health, Public Policy, Nutrition, and Sustainable Agriculture appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.

item.title: Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship 2026 | Win Up to $2,000 USD for Sustainability & Social Impact Projects
item.dc:creator: Stalin Daniel
item.description:
Young people around the world are leading innovative projects that tackle some of the planet’s biggest challenges. To support these future leaders, Young Planet Leaders is offering the Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship, a funding opportunity designed for students and young innovators dedicated to creating meaningful social and environmental impact. This sponsorship program recognizes young individuals […]

The post Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship 2026 | Win Up to $2,000 USD for Sustainability & Social Impact Projects appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
item.content:encoded:
Young people around the world are leading innovative projects that tackle some of the planet’s biggest challenges. To support these future leaders, Young Planet Leaders is offering the Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship, a funding opportunity designed for students and young innovators dedicated to creating meaningful social and environmental impact.

This sponsorship program recognizes young individuals who are actively working toward solutions in areas such as climate change, sustainability, environmental protection, social justice, community development, and other important global causes.

Through quarterly funding awards, selected applicants can receive financial support to expand, improve, and continue their impactful initiatives.

About the Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship

The Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship is an initiative by Young Planet Leaders aimed at empowering the next generation of environmental and social impact leaders.

The program seeks applicants who demonstrate:

  • Innovation and creativity
  • Commitment to sustainability and social good
  • Leadership in community or environmental projects
  • Passion for solving real-world challenges
  • Active involvement in meaningful causes

This sponsorship is specifically intended to help recipients further develop projects or organizations they are personally involved with.

The funding cannot be used for tuition fees or for-profit business activities.

Sponsorship Award Amounts

Each quarter, Young Planet Leaders offers three sponsorship awards:

  1. First Award – $2,000 USD
  2. Second Award – $1,500 USD
  3. Third Award – $1,000 USD

A total of 12 sponsorships are awarded every year.

Who Can Apply?

Applicants must meet the following eligibility criteria:

Age Requirement

  • Applicants must be under 22 years old.

Project or Contribution Requirement

Applicants should either:

  • Be working on their own project or organization related to:
    • Environmental sustainability
    • Climate action
    • Social justice
    • Community impact
    • Other meaningful causes

OR

  • Be contributing significantly to an existing project or organization focused on sustainability, environmentalism, or social impact.

What Kind of Projects Are Eligible?

The sponsorship supports a wide range of impactful initiatives, including but not limited to:

  • Climate action campaigns
  • Recycling and waste management initiatives
  • Environmental awareness programs
  • Clean energy projects
  • Community sustainability initiatives
  • Conservation programs
  • Social justice and equality projects
  • Youth advocacy movements
  • Educational outreach programs
  • Sustainable technology innovations

Applicants with creative, measurable, and community-driven ideas are strongly encouraged to apply.

How the Sponsorship Funds Can Be Used

Selected recipients are expected to use the award to strengthen or expand their impact-driven work.

Examples of acceptable uses include:

  • Purchasing project materials or equipment
  • Organizing sustainability campaigns
  • Expanding outreach activities
  • Supporting nonprofit operational costs
  • Launching educational workshops
  • Developing environmental awareness programs
  • Scaling community impact initiatives

The funds should not be used for:

  • Tuition payments
  • Personal academic expenses
  • For-profit companies or commercial business ventures

Application Deadlines

The Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship accepts applications four times each year.

Submission Deadlines:

  • March 15
  • June 15
  • September 15
  • December 15

Applicants may apply multiple times per year if they are not selected initially.

However, an individual may only receive one sponsorship award per year.

Selection Process

Applications are reviewed by the Young Planet Leaders scholarship committee.

The committee evaluates candidates based on:

  • Commitment to worthwhile causes
  • Extracurricular involvement
  • Leadership and initiative
  • Academic achievements
  • Innovation and creativity
  • Potential impact of the project
  • Intended use of sponsorship funds

Successful applicants are generally notified within one month after the application deadline.

Why You Should Apply

The Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship is more than just a funding opportunity. It is a platform that recognizes young leaders who are actively working to improve the world.

Benefits of applying include:

  • Financial support for impactful projects
  • Recognition for sustainability and social impact work
  • Opportunity to scale community initiatives
  • Increased visibility for youth-led projects
  • Motivation and encouragement for young innovators

For students and young leaders passionate about making a difference, this sponsorship can help turn ideas into real-world impact.

Final Thoughts

Young Planet Leaders continues to support young innovators who are committed to solving global challenges through creativity, leadership, and action.

If you are under 22 and actively contributing to environmental sustainability, social impact, or community change, this is an excellent opportunity to receive funding and recognition for your efforts.

Learn more and apply

Interested applicants are encouraged to prepare a strong application showcasing their project goals, achievements, impact, and future plans before the next submission deadline.

Click HERE to learn more and apply for the Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship 2026.

Explore more opportunities on OFY HERE.

The post Young Changemaker Quarterly Sponsorship 2026 | Win Up to $2,000 USD for Sustainability & Social Impact Projects appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.

item.title: Over 200 Fully Funded PhD Positions at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic (UM6P) for 2026–2027: Applications Now Open
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Study in Morocco with a Fully Funded PhD Opportunity at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic Are you looking for a fully funded PhD opportunity in 2026? Applications are now open for more than 200 fully funded doctoral positions at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic (UM6P) in Morocco for the 2026–2027 academic year. This prestigious opportunity is offered […]

The post Over 200 Fully Funded PhD Positions at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic (UM6P) for 2026–2027: Applications Now Open appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
item.content:encoded:
Study in Morocco with a Fully Funded PhD Opportunity at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic

Are you looking for a fully funded PhD opportunity in 2026? Applications are now open for more than 200 fully funded doctoral positions at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic (UM6P) in Morocco for the 2026–2027 academic year.

This prestigious opportunity is offered through the Center for Doctoral Studies (CEDoc), UM6P’s dedicated doctoral training hub that promotes excellence, innovation, and multidisciplinary research. The university welcomes talented researchers from Morocco, Africa, and around the world who are eager to contribute to solving some of the most pressing global and regional challenges.

About the Center for Doctoral Studies (CEDoc)

The Center for Doctoral Studies (CEDoc) at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic is committed to developing the next generation of researchers, innovators, and thought leaders.

CEDoc provides doctoral candidates with:

  • High-quality academic supervision
  • Access to world-class research facilities
  • Interdisciplinary research opportunities
  • Collaboration across multiple research centers and institutes
  • Mentorship from internationally recognized experts
  • An innovation-driven research environment

The program is designed to equip PhD candidates with the skills, knowledge, and experience needed to excel in academia, industry, policy, and entrepreneurship.

Fully Funded PhD Research Areas Available

The 2026–2027 PhD call includes opportunities across numerous research units and disciplines.

Africa Business School (ABS)

Research topics include:

  • Dynamic Pricing under Uncertainty and Market Power
  • Designing Better Organizations through Behavioral Science, Collective Intelligence, and Artificial Intelligence
  • Digital Technologies and Women Entrepreneurship in Morocco
  • Climate Impacts on Household Finance
  • Artificial Intelligence and Economic Power: Utopia or Dystopia?

Africa Center of Manufacturing Excellence (ACME)

Research topics include:

  • Multi-Modal NDT Data Fusion for Structural Integrity Assessment
  • Additive Manufacturing of Structured Catalysts and Sorbents
  • Advanced Lightweight Sandwich Structures for Aerospace Applications
  • AI-Based Multi-Sensor Inspection for Composite Structures
  • Explainable Digital Twins for Predictive Maintenance

College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)

Research topics include:

  • Hydroclimatic Shifts in North Africa
  • Groundwater and Water Resource Management
  • Water Cycle Dynamics in Semi-Arid Regions
  • Climate Change Adaptation Research
  • Sustainable Agriculture and Environmental Systems

Additional opportunities are available across several other UM6P research institutes and centers, covering fields such as engineering, data science, artificial intelligence, sustainability, economics, manufacturing, environmental sciences, and emerging technologies.

Who Can Apply?

Applicants should hold:

  • A Master’s degree
  • An Engineering degree
  • Or an equivalent qualification relevant to the proposed research area

Candidates from all nationalities are encouraged to apply.

Application Deadline

📅 Application Deadline: July 15, 2026

Interested applicants should review the available research topics carefully before submitting their applications.

Important: Candidates may apply to a maximum of two PhD subjects.

Why Choose UM6P?

University Mohammed VI Polytechnic has emerged as one of Africa’s leading research universities, with a strong focus on innovation, sustainability, entrepreneurship, and impact-driven research.

Benefits of joining UM6P include:

  • Access to cutting-edge research infrastructure
  • Collaboration with leading international researchers
  • Strong industry and institutional partnerships
  • A vibrant international academic community
  • Opportunities to contribute to Africa’s development and global scientific advancement

How to Apply

Prospective applicants can explore the available doctoral research topics and submit their applications through the official UM6P doctoral admissions portal.

Early application is strongly encouraged due to the competitive nature of these positions.

Final Thoughts

For aspiring researchers seeking a fully funded PhD in Africa, the University Mohammed VI Polytechnic’s 2026–2027 doctoral recruitment campaign presents an exceptional opportunity. With over 200 funded positions spanning diverse disciplines, world-class research facilities, and a commitment to innovation and excellence, UM6P offers an ideal environment to pursue advanced research and make a meaningful impact.

Don’t miss your chance to join one of Africa’s fastest-growing research institutions and advance your academic and professional career.

Key Information at a Glance

  • Institution: University Mohammed VI Polytechnic (UM6P)
  • Program: Fully Funded PhD Positions
  • Number of Positions: 200+
  • Academic Year: 2026–2027
  • Location: Morocco
  • Eligible Applicants: Master’s degree, Engineering degree, or equivalent holders
  • Application Limit: Maximum of 2 research subjects
  • Deadline: July 15, 2026

For questions regarding the application process, applicants may contact: cedoc@um6p.ma

 

How to Apply

Prospective applicants can explore the available doctoral research topics and submit their applications through the official UM6P doctoral admissions portal.

Early application is strongly encouraged due to the competitive nature of these positions.

The post Over 200 Fully Funded PhD Positions at University Mohammed VI Polytechnic (UM6P) for 2026–2027: Applications Now Open appeared first on Opportunities for Youth.
